name: Anthropic Team
description: High-signal Anthropic launches verified against official Anthropic, Claude, and Claude Help sources.
headline: Verified Anthropic launches across {days} days.
subtitle: January 12 — April 9, 2026. Company-level launches from official Anthropic sources.
footnote: Cross-checked on April 13, 2026 against Anthropic News, Claude blog posts, and Claude Help Center release notes.

releases.title: Cowork research preview
releases.description: Claude Desktop gained Cowork for multi-step knowledge work on local files and connected tools.

releases.title: Interactive connectors and MCP Apps
releases.description: Anthropic introduced interactive connectors and app surfaces that run directly inside Claude conversations.

releases.title: Claude Opus 4.6
releases.description: Anthropic launched Opus 4.6 as its most capable model for complex coding and long-running agent tasks.

releases.title: Claude Sonnet 4.6
releases.description: Anthropic launched Sonnet 4.6 as the new balanced flagship across speed, coding, and reasoning.

releases.title: Cowork and plugins for teams across the enterprise
releases.description: Claude expanded Cowork with plugins, admin controls, and broader enterprise workflows.

releases.title: Memory for free users
releases.description: Chat search and memory rolled out to free Claude users instead of staying limited to paid tiers.

releases.title: Advancing Claude for Excel and PowerPoint
releases.description: Claude's Microsoft add-ins began sharing context across Excel and PowerPoint and added skills support.

releases.title: Claude builds interactive visuals right in your conversation
releases.description: Claude started creating inline charts, diagrams, and visual explanations directly in chat.

releases.title: Claude Mythos Preview — Project Glasswing
releases.description: Anthropic unveiled Claude Mythos Preview, a cybersecurity-focused model released to 11 organizations under Project Glasswing to find and fix vulnerabilities in critical software.

releases.title: Claude Managed Agents public beta
releases.description: Anthropic launched Claude Managed Agents in public beta — a fully managed agent harness with secure sandboxing, built-in tools, scoped permissions, and end-to-end tracing.

releases.title: Cowork goes GA with computer use and enterprise controls
releases.description: Claude Cowork reached general availability on macOS and Windows for all paid plans, adding computer use for Pro and Max users, OpenTelemetry analytics, and role-based access controls for Enterprise.
